title: Acceptance
description: An acceptance record stored in acceptances/<assignment-id>/<login>.json within a PXL Classroom control repository.

assignment_id.description: ID of the assignment being accepted.

github_id.description: Immutable GitHub user ID (sender.id from the star event).

accepted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the acceptance was recorded.

star_event_ref.description: URL of the workflow run that processed the star event.

status.description: Current status of the acceptance lifecycle.
